meta.purpose: Translation memory / canonical transliteration lock for the Time Machine ingestion pipeline (proposed R86). Seeded from al-Bidayah year 132. Every Thai spelling of a scholar/place/title MUST match canonicalThai; new names append here.
meta.transliterationBasis: Locked precedents from REVIEW-QUEUE.md / AUDIT-FIXES.md (e.g. ابن→อิบนุ, ال→อัล, ط→ฏ, ة→ะฮ์, nisba ي→ีย์). Arabic is byte-exact reference only (never edited).
